name: Collector
notable: 40x Vestas V117-3.3MW. Origin Energy PPA. CWP Renewables developed, Squadron Energy now owns.

timeline.title: EPBC Referral 2011/5899
timeline.detail: Collector Wind Farm — Not Controlled Action

timeline.title: Commercial operations commenced
timeline.detail: Commencement date from AEMO registration via OpenElectricity.

timeline.title: First generation recorded
timeline.detail: First market dispatch data recorded in AEMO systems.

eis_specs.document_title: Collector Wind Farm Environmental Impact Statement (NSW DP&E SSD-7480)
eis_specs.hub_height_note: Standard 91.5 m hub for V117-3.3 MW on NSW Southern Tablelands
eis_specs.wind_speed_period: Mean annual wind speed at hub height; Collector, Southern Tablelands NSW — from on-site met mast
eis_specs.energy_yield_method: WAsP modelling with long-term correction; P50 net yield
eis_specs.connection_substation_name: Capital 330 kV substation (TransGrid), near Collector/Bungendore NSW
eis_specs.connection_distance_note: ~15 km of 330 kV connection to TransGrid Capital substation near Collector/Bungendore, Southern Tablelands.
eis_specs.connection_augmentation: New 330 kV connection to TransGrid Capital substation. TransGrid upgraded Capital to handle multiple Southern Tablelands wind farms including Collector and Rye Park.
eis_specs.notes: 219 MW (66 x 3.3 MW Vestas V117), near Collector township, Southern Tablelands NSW (between Canberra and Goulburn). Developer: Tilt Renewables. NSW SSD approval 2018. Now operating (2022). Same TransGrid Capital substation connection node as Rye Park Wind Farm.
